items.text: Geographic Distribution The following table shows the geographic distribution of Business Insurance’s direct written premiums for the year ended December 31, 2025.
items.rationale: Standard geographic distribution table of premiums, purely informational, not a risk statement.

items.text: Geographic Distribution The following table shows the geographic distribution of Bond & Specialty Insurance’s direct written premiums for the year ended December 31, 2025.
items.rationale: Standard geographic distribution table of premiums, purely informational, not a risk statement.

items.text: 14 Geographic Distribution The following table shows the geographic distribution of Personal Insurance’s direct written premiums for the year ended December 31, 2025.
items.rationale: Standard geographic distribution table of premiums, purely informational, not a risk statement.

items.text: Coverage is provided on an all-perils basis, including but not limited to hurricanes, tornadoes, hail storms, earthquakes, wildfires, winter storms and/or freeze losses (including coverage for terrorism events in limited circumstances).
items.rationale: Adds specific detail about the scope of coverage perils (hurricanes, wildfires, terrorism, etc.) which expands on existing catastrophe/underwriting risk description.

items.text: The following table shows the geographic distribution of the Company’s employees as of December 31, 2025.
items.rationale: Informational table about employee geographic distribution, not a risk statement.

items.text: The Company recognizes that we must maintain our talent advantage by attracting and retaining high performing employees.
items.rationale: Generic statement about human capital strategy goals, no specific risk identified.

items.text: Our human capital management strategy deploys industry-leading practices to attract, hire, develop and support high performing talent from all backgrounds, geographies and experiences.
items.rationale: Generic HR strategy language, cautionary framing without specific risk detail.

items.text: Additionally, models and technology are used in the claim estimation process, which can present risks of model inaccuracy.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new risk of model inaccuracy in claim estimation processes due to use of models/technology.

items.text: Also, in some cases, if we do not write a particular product for an account, we could lose the ability to write other products for the same account.
items.rationale: Identifies a specific new business risk of losing ability to write other products if one product for an account is not written.

items.text: Artificial intelligence, in particular, may become more expensive in the future given the resources necessary to develop that technology.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new risk regarding rising costs associated with AI development resources.

items.text: With respect to artificial intelligence, emerging intellectual property-related rights and issues are being interpreted by courts and addressed by regulations.
items.rationale: Identifies a new specific legal/IP risk tied to evolving AI-related intellectual property interpretations.

items.text: Regarding artificial intelligence, legal and regulatory frameworks are developing and subject to change.
items.rationale: Introduces a new specific regulatory risk related to developing and changing AI legal frameworks.
